subTitle.v: Cập nhật đơn hàng: đóng, bỏ đóng...

query.text: exec rs_LoadPOApproval 'PO1, PO2', 'c94$000000, c95$000000', 'm94$, m95$', @@partition, @@expression, @@extension, @@pageCount, 'stt_rec', @@textList, @@textExternal , 'a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh', @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, 1, 0, '', 'status not in (''5'', ''*'')', 1

action.text: declare @l int, @size int, @i int, @id char(13), @part char(1) select @size = col_length('wrkgl', 'stt_rec') select @i = 1, @l = datalength(text)/2 from @s while @i + @size <= @l + 1 begin select @id = replace(substring(text, @i, @size), '''', ''), @i = @i + @size + 1 from @s select @part = right(@id, 1) exec rs_PostPOClosed @@userID, @id, @part, @@sysDatabaseName end select 1 as value return

declare @l int, @size int, @i int, @id char(13), @part char(1) select @size = col_length('wrkgl', 'stt_rec') select @i = 1, @l = datalength(text)/2 from @s while @i + @size <= @l + 1 begin select @id = replace(substring(text, @i, @size), '''', ''), @i = @i + @size + 1 from @s select @part = right(@id, 1) exec rs_UnPostPOClosed @@userID, @id, @part, @@sysDatabaseName end select 2 as value return
